data.name: Gynocracy
data.detailed_description:
In this femdom-themed erotic visual novel, you will follow the story of a young married couple whose sailing trip in the Mediterranean takes an unexpected turn. They find themselves in Queen's Isle, a small, isolated island nation ruled by President Danielle Ashcroft. Ashcroft and her all-female government have transformed the country into a matriarchal society where men are considered second-class citizens.

While the wife, Kalie, is accepted and treated with respect, the husband finds he's suddenly at the bottom of the food chain. Can he overcome the odds and escape this nightmare? It's up to you.

Experience a unique story of domination, corruption by power, intrigue and deadly conspiracies. Your choices will affect the fate of not only the main characters, but also the entire country.

Meet an extensive cast of over 20 key characters. Sexy ladies of power, ruthless politicians, bratty students, sadistic enforcers and more. All ready to bring you down and humiliate you. Will you let them?

The game is divided into story chapters. There are currently 10 chapters available + a bonus Christmas chapter. (Note: the game is currently in Early Access, new chapters are being released every few months).

  • 8,000 detailed 2K renders

  • 120,000 words of story

  • Image gallery

  • Steam achievements

  • Steam community items

The erotic content of the game is primarily focused on female domination. Femdom fans will find a wide range of related kinks, but most of them are optional, allowing you to tailor the experience to your personal preferences.

Some of the kinks include:

  • BDSM

  • chastity

  • cuckolding

  • foot/shoe/boot fetish

  • panty fetish

  • latex and lingerie

  • lesbian domination

  • verbal and physical humiliation

  • spanking

  • pegging

  • medical fetish

  • sissification/feminization

  • ...and more

data.short_description: Gynocracy is a story-driven femdom game (adult visual novel) set in a dystopian matriarchal society. Follow the story of a married young couple confronted with the new reality of a female-dominated country and shape their destiny with the choices you make.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 捷克文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 義大利文, 波蘭文, 土耳其文, 俄文, 烏克蘭文
data.reviews:
“Gynocracy is an excellent AVN that any Femdom fan can't miss! It stands out for the very attractive design of women, a really original plot and a generous amount of kinks that will satisfy the desires of most players.”
Steam

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
